title: agropyron lolioides
intro: Agropyron lolioides, also known as slender wheat grass or lolioides wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron lolioides include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Agropyron lolioides can be consumed as a tea, juice, or supplement, or used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules.
